---
title: "Product Overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Product Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

Analytics Workstation is software that investigates before it recommends.

It preserves the path from objective to evidence to recommendation: what was observed, what remained uncertain, which explanations competed, how evidence changed belief, and why the final claim deserves trust.

The Build Week release is intentionally narrow. It demonstrates a governed investigation over a deterministic synthetic dataset, with deterministic services producing evidence and a bounded AI layer supporting synthesis, belief revision, claim verification, and integrity review.

## Start

Install the package, then launch:

```r
library(AnalyticsShinyApp)
run_workstation()
```

The browser opens the workstation shell. The brand mark returns to Home, workspaces stay in fixed locations, and the Build Week demo is available from `More`.
